rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is to translate customer behavior (initial choice, repurchase, future revenue) into amenity ROI/NPV, while the cited paper develops a customer-based discounted-earnings valuation framework emphasizing retention’s impact on value—an evident conceptual/methodological overlap in customer-to-financial valuation. With an exact DOI match but no in-text snippet, this does not look safely like a purely incidental background mention.
